parameters.query: SELECT id, concept, primary_lang FROM content_seeds WHERE perf_score > 0.7 ORDER BY perf_score DESC LIMIT 3

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents:[{role:'user',parts:[{text:$json.prompt}]}], generationConfig:{ temperature:0.8, topP:0.95, maxOutputTokens:2000, responseMimeType:'application/json', thinkingConfig:{thinkingBudget:0} }, safetySettings:[ {category:'HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT',threshold:'BLOCK_NONE'}, {category:'HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH',threshold:'BLOCK_NONE'}, {category:'HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT',threshold:'BLOCK_NONE'}, {category:'HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT',threshold:'BLOCK_NONE'} ] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
console.warn('[w49] multi-format rejected:', JSON.stringify({ format: $json.format, lang: $json.lang, platform: $json.platform, reason: $json.reason, preview: $json.preview }));
return [{ json: { ...$json, dropped: true } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, asset_type: $json.format, lang: $json.lang, platform: $json.platform, rows_inserted: 1 } }}
